afterHooks.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist "after all" hook in "Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist"

tests.title: Every bet references a committed server seed hash present in the seeds array
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Commit–Reveal System & Seed Handling Every bet references a committed server seed hash present in the seeds array

tests.title: Server seed reveal matches commit
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Commit–Reveal System & Seed Handling Server seed reveal matches commit

tests.title: Client seed is variable and incorporated into outcome generation
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Commit–Reveal System & Seed Handling Client seed is variable and incorporated into outcome generation

tests.title: Nonce starts correctly, increments by 1 and is never reused
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Commit–Reveal System & Seed Handling Nonce starts correctly, increments by 1 and is never reused

tests.title: Game results producing algorithm is fully deterministic
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Commit–Reveal System & Seed Handling Game results producing algorithm is fully deterministic

tests.title: No mixed entropy sources (drand_round and drand_randomness are null for plinko)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Randomness & Entropy Model No mixed entropy sources (drand_round and drand_randomness are null for plinko)

tests.title: Mapping from RNG → bucket position is unbiased (2^32 % 2 === 0)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Randomness & Entropy Model Mapping from RNG → bucket position is unbiased (2^32 % 2 === 0)
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(Math.pow(2, 32) % 2).to.eql(0);

beforeHooks.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests) "before all" hook in "Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests)"

tests.title: Live game outcomes exactly match verifier outputs
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests) Live game outcomes exactly match verifier outputs

tests.title: No post-RNG modification (covered by determinism parity)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests) No post-RNG modification (covered by determinism parity)
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(testFailed).to.eql(false);

tests.title: No conditional logic based on bet size or timing (covered by determinism parity)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests) No conditional logic based on bet size or timing (covered by determinism parity)
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(testFailed).to.eql(false);

tests.title: RNG state does not leak across rounds (covered by determinism parity)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Verifier ↔ Live Parity (Empirical Tests) RNG state does not leak across rounds (covered by determinism parity)

afterHooks.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Game Logic & RTP Validation "after all" hook in "Game Logic & RTP Validation"

tests.title: Payout rules correctness – live win matches betAmount × multiplier within floating-point tolerance (< 0.000001)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Game Logic & RTP Validation Payout rules correctness – live win matches betAmount × multiplier within floating-point tolerance (< 0.000001)

tests.title: Theoretical RTP from official API multipliers confirms 99.9000% for all 27 configs
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Game Logic & RTP Validation Theoretical RTP from official API multipliers confirms 99.9000% for all 27 configs

tests.title: Simulated RTP converges to theoretical (1M rounds per config, sync HMAC)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Game Logic & RTP Validation Simulated RTP converges to theoretical (1M rounds per config, sync HMAC)

tests.title: RTP converges with auditor-generated seeds (independent of casino RNG)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Game Logic & RTP Validation RTP converges with auditor-generated seeds (independent of casino RNG)

tests.title: Zero-edge and standard bets use identical multipliers
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Zero Edge Split Verification Zero-edge and standard bets use identical multipliers

tests.title: Slot distribution matches binomial B(n, 0.5) for all 27 configs at p=0.05
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Audit – Execution Checklist Chi-Squared Goodness-of-Fit (Simulation Data) Slot distribution matches binomial B(n, 0.5) for all 27 configs at p=0.05

tests.title: Every API table has exactly (rows + 1) entries
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles Every API table has exactly (rows + 1) entries

tests.title: All API multipliers are positive finite numbers
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles All API multipliers are positive finite numbers

tests.title: API tables are symmetric (plinko is symmetric around center)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles API tables are symmetric (plinko is symmetric around center)

tests.title: Center slot has lowest multiplier in high risk (house-edge design)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles Center slot has lowest multiplier in high risk (house-edge design)

tests.title: getMultiplier throws on invalid config
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles getMultiplier throws on invalid config

tests.title: All 27 configurations are defined (3 risks × 9 row counts)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles All 27 configurations are defined (3 risks × 9 row counts)

tests.title: High risk has highest edge multipliers at position 0 for all row counts
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Game Profiles High risk has highest edge multipliers at position 0 for all row counts

tests.title: Generator produces correct slot for all captured bets
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Generator produces correct slot for all captured bets

tests.title: Known example: nonce=4, rows=16, high → slot 8
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Known example: nonce=4, rows=16, high → slot 8
tests.code:
const slot = await generator.generatePlinkoResult("4351b2c37e32c3575ccbcd51214ff1ca6da8b460dc15f9bb7930e0c753795204", "PH_NW_777fLkqsHC", 4, 16);
(0, chai_1.expect)(slot).to.eql(8);

tests.title: Known example: nonce=5, rows=8, low → slot 6
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Known example: nonce=5, rows=8, low → slot 6
tests.code:
const slot = await generator.generatePlinkoResult("4351b2c37e32c3575ccbcd51214ff1ca6da8b460dc15f9bb7930e0c753795204", "PH_NW_777fLkqsHC", 5, 8);
(0, chai_1.expect)(slot).to.eql(6);

tests.title: Known example: nonce=16, rows=16, high → slot 11
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Known example: nonce=16, rows=16, high → slot 11
tests.code:
const slot = await generator.generatePlinkoResult("4351b2c37e32c3575ccbcd51214ff1ca6da8b460dc15f9bb7930e0c753795204", "PH_NW_777fLkqsHC", 16, 16);
(0, chai_1.expect)(slot).to.eql(11);

tests.title: Known example: nonce=26, rows=9, high → slot 7
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Known example: nonce=26, rows=9, high → slot 7
tests.code:
const slot = await generator.generatePlinkoResult("4351b2c37e32c3575ccbcd51214ff1ca6da8b460dc15f9bb7930e0c753795204", "PH_NW_777fLkqsHC", 26, 9);
(0, chai_1.expect)(slot).to.eql(7);

tests.title: Known example: nonce=11, rows=16, medium → slot 11
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Known example: nonce=11, rows=16, medium → slot 11
tests.code:
const slot = await generator.generatePlinkoResult("4351b2c37e32c3575ccbcd51214ff1ca6da8b460dc15f9bb7930e0c753795204", "PH_NW_777fLkqsHC", 11, 16);
(0, chai_1.expect)(slot).to.eql(11);

tests.title: Result is deterministic – same inputs always produce same slot
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Result is deterministic – same inputs always produce same slot

tests.title: Different nonces produce different results
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Different nonces produce different results

tests.title: Slot is always in valid range [0, rows]
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Slot is always in valid range [0, rows]

tests.title: Sync path produces identical results to async path
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Results Generator Tests Sync path produces identical results to async path

tests.title: Returns betAmount * API multiplier for each risk/rows/slot combination
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Returns betAmount * API multiplier for each risk/rows/slot combination

tests.title: Returns 0 for bet amount 0
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Returns 0 for bet amount 0
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(0, 4, 8, "low")).to.eql(0);

tests.title: Throws on negative bet amount
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Throws on negative bet amount
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(() => PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(-1, 4, 8, "low")).to.throw();

tests.title: Throws on invalid rows (< 8)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Throws on invalid rows (< 8)
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(() => PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(1, 3, 7, "low")).to.throw();

tests.title: Throws on invalid rows (> 16)
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Throws on invalid rows (> 16)
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(() => PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(1, 8, 17, "low")).to.throw();

tests.title: Throws on bucketPosition > rows
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Throws on bucketPosition > rows
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(() => PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(1, 9, 8, "low")).to.throw();

tests.title: Throws on negative bucketPosition
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests Throws on negative bucketPosition
tests.code: (0, chai_1.expect)(() => PlinkoWinCalculator_1.PlinkoWinCalculator.calculateWinnings(1, -1, 8, "low")).to.throw();

tests.title: High risk gives higher variance payouts than low risk for same rows
tests.fullTitle: Plinko Win Calculator Tests High risk gives higher variance payouts than low risk for same rows
